```{=html}
<!-- Filter problem: filter(!(cond1 & cond2)) drops NAs too -->
<script>
window.FP_TITLE_PRE = 'filter(!(';
window.FP_CONDS_TEXT = ['island == "Torgersen"', 'body_mass_g > 4000'];
window.FP_TITLE_POST = '))';
window.FP_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '3750'],
  ['Adelie',    'Biscoe',    '3800'],
  ['Adelie',    'Dream',     '3300'],
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '4500'],
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', 'NA'],
];
window.FP_COLS = ['species', 'island', 'body_mass_g'];
// one base colour per condition
window.FP_COLORS = ['#e8853a', '#c54a4a'];
// one boolean array per column: does that cell satisfy the column's condition?
window.FP_HITS = [
  // island == "Torgersen"
  [true,  false, false, true,  true ],
  // body_mass_g > 4000
  [false, false, false, true,  false],
];
</script>
```

::: {.fp-stage-wrap}
<div id="fp-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .fp-frag id="fp-negation"}
[]{.fragment .fp-frag id="fp-cond-1"}
[]{.fragment .fp-frag id="fp-cond-2"}
[]{.fragment .fp-frag id="fp-both"}
[]{.fragment .fp-frag id="fp-problem"}
